Dorothy attends a celebration at the home of Boq, a wealthy Munchkin. Amidst the festivities, Boq mistakenly identifies her as a "friendly witch" because of her silver shoes and blue-and-white attire.
From festive celebration to social confusion/tension.
High-energy festive dancing and communal eating in a wealthy courtyard.
Stagnant social tension following the witch accusation.
